citations.data_sensitivity: Section 'Data Inputs': 'The model consumes applicant credit bureau history and self-reported income data.'
citations.user_scope: Section 'Users': 'Recommendations are shown to loan officers ... before any pre-approval offer is issued to a consumer.'
citations.business_impact_tier: Section 'Impact': 'The business considers this a high-impact system given its role in the lending funnel.'
citations.reversibility: Section 'Impact': 'a declined pre-approval can still proceed to full underwriting review.'
